title: Themes and Concepts and components, elements
author: joshualinog
excerpt: - heaven and earth, barrier above from below - infect Egyptian mythology with YESHUA, reorientate Egyptian mythos reimagined and refocused on Yeshua himself - a kind of meditation version of what Akhe
content:
- heaven and earth, barrier above from below
- infect Egyptian mythology with YESHUA, reorientate Egyptian mythos reimagined and refocused on Yeshua himself
- a kind of meditation version of what Akhenhaten tried to do to Egyptian religion, but in an apostolic sense taking every paradigm captive and making it obedient to Jesus Christ
- name changes: 
     - Jourdain to Linog 
     - Yosef/Joseph to Zaphenath-Paneah
     - Yeshua to Jesus 
     - hoshea/Hosea to Joshua
     - Mushe to Moshe 
- sonship, whose son? 
- patronage, who is the father?
- Moshe name meaning(s) , name and identity after birth out of waters
- bizarre ontological cosmological questions and requests : panentheism model of the seven spaces and the soul being on us?
